name: Chicken in a Pot with Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine chicken, carrots, onion, celery, peppercorns, and bay leaf. Cover with water and bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 to 1 1/2 hours until the meat falls off the bone easily.
3. Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside to cool.
4. Strain the liquid and reserve it for removing vegetables and stock.
5. When the chicken is cool, remove all meat from the bones and shred it.
6. In a large heavy pot, heat oil over medium-high heat.
7. Stir in chopped onion and cook for 1 minute.
8. Add sliced carrots, celery, and potatoes and toss to coat. Cook vegetables for 3 minutes.
9. Stir in flour and cook for 2 minutes.
10. Add the reserved stock and stir until it thickens. If more liquid is needed, add an additional cup of water.
11. Simmer for 30 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
12. Stir in shredded chicken and parsley, then season with salt and pepper.
Yield: 4-6 servings
